name: Monterey Bean Bake
recipeIngredient: 15 oz dark red kidney beans, drained and washed
1/4 cup low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, grated
1/2 cup red and green bell peppers, chopped
1/4 cup low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare an 8-inch square dish with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine beans, corn, 1/4 cup cheese, tomato sauce, bell peppers, and onions. Pour into prepared dish.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine cornmeal, milk, and egg white. Pour over bean mixture.
5. Bake for 40 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with remaining cheese and continue to bake for 2 minutes or until cheese melts.
